Immanuelle Leonhart is the founder of Lifeism
==Names==
Immanuelle goes by many names. Such as 日巫女
[[File:日-order.gif|thumb]]
[[File:巫-order.gif|thumb]]
[[File:女-order.gif|thumb]]
{| class="wikitable"
|+
!
!
!
!
|-
|Immanuelle
|Emma
|H.
|Leonhart
|-
|
|閻魔
|日巫女
|獅心
|-
|
|Enma
|Himiko
|Shishin
|}
[[Category:First 250 notes]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
[[Category:Gaiad characters]][[Category:Pages]]
